    have : Even (Fintype.card (T k)) := by
      refine ⟨Fintype.card (Quotient (Orbits (trivialInvo k))), ?_⟩
      simpa [hfix, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.add_zero] using hcard
    exact this.not_odd
  exact hnodd hodd

classical
  refine ⟨⟨(Fintype.chooseX (T k)), ?_⟩⟩
  exact (Fintype.chooseX_spec (T k)).2

classical
  by_contra hne
  have hcard : Fintype.card (fixedPoints (trivialInvo k)) = 0 := by
    simpa [Finset.card_eq_zero] using Fintype.card_eq_zero_of_isEmpty (α := fixedPoints (trivialInvo k))
  have hodd : Odd (Fintype.card (T k)) := card_T_odd (k := k)
  have hsq : trivialInvo k ^ 2 = (1 : Function.End (T k)) := by
    change trivialInvo k ∘ trivialInvo k = id
    funext x
    cases x with
    | mk x hx =>
      cases x with
      | mk x hxS =>
        cases x with
        | mk x y z =>
          simp [trivialInvo]
  have hfixed : Fintype.card (fixedPoints (trivialInvo k)) % 2 = Fintype.card (T k) % 2 := by
    simpa using (Fintype.card_fixedPoints_mod_two_eq_card_mod_two (f := trivialInvo k) hsq)
  have : (Fintype.card (T k)) % 2 = 0 := by
    simpa [hcard] using hfixed.symm
  have : ¬ Odd (Fintype.card (T k)) := by
    intro hO
    rcases hO with ⟨m, hm⟩
    have : (Fintype.card (T k)) % 2 = 1 := by
      simpa [hm, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] using congrArg (fun n => n % 2) hm
    exact Nat.zero_ne_one (by simpa [this] using this)
  exact this hodd

classical
  by_contra h
  have hEven : Even (Fintype.card (T k)) := by
    have hIso : Nonempty ((T k) ≃ (T k ⊕ fixedPoints (trivialInvo k))) := by
      simpa [Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff] using (Fintype.equivSumFixedPoints (trivialInvo k)).symm
    have : Fintype.card (fixedPoints (trivialInvo k)) = 0 := by
      simpa [Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff] using h
    have hcard : Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (T k) + Fintype.card (fixedPoints (trivialInvo k)) := by
      simpa [Fintype.card_sum] using (Fintype.card_congr (Classical.choice hIso))
    have : Fintype.card (T k) = 2 * Fintype.card (T k) := by
      nlinarith [hcard, this]
    refine ⟨Fintype.card (T k), ?_⟩
    nlinarith
  have hOdd : Odd (Fintype.card (T k)) := card_T_odd (k := k)
  exact hOdd.not_even hEven
